question: Is there a long wooden dining table covered with a dark red checkered tablecloth in the foreground?
Is the plate of fried chicken legs positioned as the leftmost food item on the table?
Are there exactly six pieces of fried chicken stacked on the plate?
Is there a bowl of steaming white rice positioned to the right of the fried chicken?
Are there exactly three small blue-and-white porcelain patterned sauce dishes on the table?
Do the three sauce dishes contain dark brown soy sauce, emerald green wasabi, and bright red chili sauce respectively?
Are there exactly two transparent glass cups filled with orange juice?
Is there an unopened dark green glass bottle of beer on the table?
Is there a bowl of purple cold eggplant salad on the table?
Is there a white porcelain rectangular plate holding exactly eight golden pan-fried dumplings?
Is the young woman seated on the left side wearing a light pink floral dress?
Is the young woman's right hand holding silver stainless steel chopsticks picking up a crayfish?
Is the young woman's left hand holding a napkin?
Is the man seated beside the young woman wearing a gray polo shirt and silver-framed glasses?
Is the man raising a beer glass?
Is the little boy seated across from the couple wearing a black and white striped T-shirt?
Does the little boy have visible ketchup stains around his mouth?
Is the elderly woman seated next to the boy wearing a dark purple knitted cardigan?
Is the elderly woman serving food into the boy's bowl?
Are there exactly three decorative paintings with gold frames hanging side by side on a beige wall in the background?
Is there a dark brown solid wood sideboard positioned below the paintings?
Is there a cyan ceramic vase on the sideboard holding exactly three white lilies?
Are there a brass table lamp and an eight-piece white porcelain tea set on the sideboard?
Is there a red lacquerware fruit bowl on the sideboard containing seven or eight oranges and apples?
Is there a double wooden-framed glass door leading to a balcony on the right side of the background?
Are there approximately six pots of different varieties of green hanging plants on the balcony railing?
Are distant gray-white high-rise residential buildings visible through the gaps between the plants?
Is a construction tower crane visible in the distance?
Are light blue mountain range silhouettes visible in the background?
Are the faces of the four people clear and free from severe distortion?
Are the hands (especially holding chopsticks and glasses) free from anatomical deformities like extra fingers?
Are the main table items and people fully present in the frame without being severely cut off?
